_meta.purpose: Running list of standard/preferred auto carriers seen filing REAL rate changes in SERFF pulls but NOT yet in the tool's auto roster (index.html CARRIERS_STANDARD / LOCAL_CARRIER_DEFS). Candidates for future roster expansion — data-driven, built as we triage each state's full filing list.
_meta.how_built: During each state's SERFF triage, non-roster carriers with a real (non-0%, non-symbol) PPA rate filing get added here with the state. Recognizable standard/regional/insurtech only; pure nonstandard/high-risk writers (First Acceptance, Unique, American Freedom, American Hallmark, MICO, Miami Mutual, Mendakota, Cimarron, Young America, First Chicago) are intentionally excluded — not roster-expansion material for a standard-rate comparison tool.
_meta.next_step: When a candidate shows up across several states with real volume, add it to the roster (base + STATE_CARRIER_ADJ) and recalibrate. American National is the strongest — seen filing in NV/GA/SC/TN.

entities: American National Property And Casualty Company
American National.note: Multi-state standard carrier; filed real rate changes repeatedly (SC +18.96%, GA, TN). Strongest expansion candidate.

Elephant Insurance.note: Admiral Group US direct writer; growing footprint.

Tesla Property & Casualty.note: Telematics-based, EV-focused; expanding state by state.
